scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && npx -y netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir=dist
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx -y wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=tennis-3d
scripts.deploy:vercel: npm run build && npx -y vercel deploy --prod --yes dist
scripts.deploy:surge: npm run build && npx -y surge dist
